title: Fire News 2022
summary: Syracuse Fire Department responded to a residential structure fire on December 23, 2022 at 200 Mather Street, extinguishing an enclosed front porch fire that displaced five occupants. The incident represents routine emergency response operations with no reported injuries or significant property damage metrics provided.
